tasks.subject: Task 0: Nix dev environment
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A `nix develop` shell providing JDK 17, Gradle, and the Android SDK with ANDROID_HOME set.

**Files:**
- Create: flake.nix
- Create: .envrc

**Verify:** `nix develop --command bash -c 'java -version 2>&1 | head -1 && ls "$ANDROID_HOME/platforms" && gradle --version | head -3'`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["flake.nix", ".envrc"], "verifyCommand": "nix develop --command bash -c 'java -version 2>&1 | head -1 && ls \"$ANDROID_HOME/platforms\" && gradle --version | head -3'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["nix develop gives java 17", "ANDROID_HOME has platforms/android-34 and build-tools/34.0.0", "gradle --version works in the shell"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Gradle project scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A buildable Android app skeleton — assembleDebug produces an APK and test runs.

**Files:**
- Create: settings.gradle.kts, build.gradle.kts, gradle.properties, gradle/libs.versions.toml
- Create: gradlew + gradle/wrapper/* (generated)
- Create: app/build.gradle.kts, app/proguard-rules.pro, app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml, app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/MainActivity.kt

**Verify:** `nix develop --command ./gradlew assembleDebug test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["settings.gradle.kts", "build.gradle.kts", "gradle.properties", "gradle/libs.versions.toml", "app/build.gradle.kts", "app/proguard-rules.pro", "app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml", "app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/MainActivity.kt"], "verifyCommand": "nix develop --command ./gradlew assembleDebug test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["assembleDebug builds app-debug.apk", "test succeeds", "applicationId ca.hld.covertart, minSdk 29, target/compileSdk 34"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: TrackResolver and core media types
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure JVM-tested logic that picks the session to follow and builds a NowPlaying with the album-art fallback chain.

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/core/SourceImage.kt, NowPlaying.kt, MetadataView.kt, TrackResolver.kt
- Test: app/src/test/java/ca/hld/covertart/core/TrackResolverTest.kt

**Verify:** `nix develop --command ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest --tests "*TrackResolverTest"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/core/SourceImage.kt", "app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/core/NowPlaying.kt", "app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/core/MetadataView.kt", "app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/core/TrackResolver.kt", "app/src/test/java/ca/hld/covertart/core/TrackResolverTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "nix develop --command ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest --tests \"*TrackResolverTest\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pickSession prefers PLAYING, tie-breaks/falls back to most recent", "resolve extracts art via ALBUM_ART -> ART -> DISPLAY_ICON", "resolve returns null for empty list, art null when no art key", "identityKey ignores playback position"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: ChangeGate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure gate deciding whether a wallpaper apply should happen — master toggle, identity dedup, debounce floor.

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/core/ChangeGate.kt
- Test: app/src/test/java/ca/hld/covertart/core/ChangeGateTest.kt

**Verify:** `nix develop --command ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest --tests "*ChangeGateTest"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/core/ChangeGate.kt", "app/src/test/java/ca/hld/covertart/core/ChangeGateTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "nix develop --command ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest --tests \"*ChangeGateTest\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["false when master disabled", "false when identity equals last applied", "false when within debounce window", "true for new identity after debounce window", "markApplied gates the same identity out"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: RenderPlan geometry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure planRender producing the G treatment geometry — full-height crop, right-anchored — plus the left scrim rectangle.

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/render/RenderPlan.kt
- Test: app/src/test/java/ca/hld/covertart/render/RenderPlanTest.kt

**Verify:** `nix develop --command ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest --tests "*RenderPlanTest"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/render/RenderPlan.kt", "app/src/test/java/ca/hld/covertart/render/RenderPlanTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "nix develop --command ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest --tests \"*RenderPlanTest\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["source scaled so height fills target", "dstRect right edge = targetWidth, left = targetWidth - scaledWidth (may be negative)", "srcRect covers whole source", "scrimRect spans 0..round(targetWidth*scrimEndFraction)", "rejects non-positive dimensions"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: WallpaperExecutor interface, Android executor, and renderer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The executor interface plus device-path AndroidCanvasExecutor and the WallpaperRenderer that glues planner to executor.

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/render/WallpaperExecutor.kt, AndroidCanvasExecutor.kt, WallpaperRenderer.kt

**Verify:** `nix develop --command ./gradlew assembleDebug`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/render/WallpaperExecutor.kt", "app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/render/AndroidCanvasExecutor.kt", "app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/render/WallpaperRenderer.kt"], "verifyCommand": "nix develop --command ./gradlew assembleDebug", "acceptanceCriteria": ["WallpaperExecutor<T>.execute(plan, source): T", "AndroidCanvasExecutor produces Bitmap sized to targetSize, draws art per dstRect, overlays gradient scrim", "AndroidSourceImage wraps Bitmap as SourceImage", "WallpaperRenderer<T> runs planRender then executor", "assembleDebug succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: AWT executor and preview harness
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Host-side render path — AwtExecutor plus procedural sample covers, faux-Niagara overlay, PreviewHarness entry point, and a runPreviews Gradle task.

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/test/java/ca/hld/covertart/render/AwtExecutor.kt
- Create: app/src/test/java/ca/hld/covertart/preview/SampleCovers.kt, FauxNiagaraOverlay.kt, PreviewHarness.kt, PreviewHarnessTest.kt
- Modify: app/build.gradle.kts (append runPreviews task)

**Verify:** `nix develop --command ./gradlew runPreviews && ls app/build/previews/`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/test/java/ca/hld/covertart/render/AwtExecutor.kt", "app/src/test/java/ca/hld/covertart/preview/SampleCovers.kt", "app/src/test/java/ca/hld/covertart/preview/FauxNiagaraOverlay.kt", "app/src/test/java/ca/hld/covertart/preview/PreviewHarness.kt", "app/src/test/java/ca/hld/covertart/preview/PreviewHarnessTest.kt", "app/build.gradle.kts"], "verifyCommand": "nix develop --command ./gradlew runPreviews && ls app/build/previews/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AwtExecutor produces BufferedImage matching targetSize with art + scrim", "SampleCovers.all has dark, bright, pale, busy, contrast-edge", "PreviewHarness.run writes one PNG per cover with faux-Niagara overlay", "runPreviews writes PNGs to app/build/previews/"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: AppState (DataStore)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** DataStore-backed persistent state — master toggle, last-applied track, status string — as Flows with suspend setters.

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/data/AppState.kt

**Verify:** `nix develop --command ./gradlew assembleDebug`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/data/AppState.kt"], "verifyCommand": "nix develop --command ./gradlew assembleDebug", "acceptanceCriteria": ["exposes masterEnabled Flow<Boolean> default true, lastTrack Flow<String> default empty, status Flow<String> default 'Not started'", "suspend setters persist to a preferences DataStore named covertart", "module compiles"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: MediaWatcherService, WallpaperApplier, and wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The long-lived NotificationListenerService running the full pipeline (resolve -> gate -> render -> apply -> persist), plus WallpaperApplier and screenSize helper.

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/device/WallpaperApplier.kt, ScreenSize.kt
- Create: app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/service/MediaWatcherService.kt
- Modify: app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml (SET_WALLPAPER permission + service)

**Verify:** `nix develop --command ./gradlew assembleDebug` and grep BIND_NOTIFICATION_LISTENER_SERVICE in manifest

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/device/WallpaperApplier.kt", "app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/device/ScreenSize.kt", "app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/service/MediaWatcherService.kt", "app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml"], "verifyCommand": "nix develop --command ./gradlew assembleDebug && grep -c BIND_NOTIFICATION_LISTENER_SERVICE app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml", "acceptanceCriteria": ["WallpaperApplier.apply calls setBitmap with FLAG_SYSTEM or FLAG_LOCK in one call", "service registers OnActiveSessionsChangedListener + per-controller callbacks, re-evaluates on onListenerConnected", "events go through trailing-debounce then resolve -> PLAYING check -> gate -> render -> apply -> AppState", "pause/stop no-op, missing art skips + updates status, setBitmap exceptions caught", "manifest declares service with BIND_NOTIFICATION_LISTENER_SERVICE + intent-filter"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: MainActivity status screen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace placeholder MainActivity with the real Compose status screen — grant-access button, master toggle, status line — observing AppState.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/MainActivity.kt (full replacement)

**Verify:** `nix develop --command ./gradlew assembleDebug`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/ca/hld/covertart/MainActivity.kt"], "verifyCommand": "nix develop --command ./gradlew assembleDebug", "acceptanceCriteria": ["button opens Settings.ACTION_NOTIFICATION_LISTENER_SETTINGS", "Switch reflects and updates AppState.masterEnabled", "status line shows AppState.status via collectAsStateWithLifecycle", "assembleDebug succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Release signing and GitHub Actions CI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire conditional release signing from Gradle properties, add the CI workflow (test -> previews -> signed release -> GitHub Release), document keystore + Obtainium setup.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/build.gradle.kts (signingConfigs + wire release)
- Create: .github/workflows/build.yml
- Modify: README.md

**Verify:** generate throwaway keystore, run assembleRelease with -P signing props -> BUILD SUCCESSFUL + signed APK

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/build.gradle.kts", ".github/workflows/build.yml", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "nix develop --command ./gradlew assembleRelease -PversionCode=7 -PsigningKeystore=$PWD/ci-test.keystore -PsigningKeyAlias=covertart -PsigningKeyPassword=testpass -PsigningStorePassword=testpass", "acceptanceCriteria": ["assembleRelease produces signed APK when signing props present, configures fine when absent", "CI runs on push to main + workflow_dispatch: checkout, JDK 17, Android SDK, test, runPreviews + artifact, signed assembleRelease, GitHub Release v1.0.<run_number>", "versionCode = run number, versionName = 1.0.<run_number>", "README documents keystore generation, secrets, Obtainium setup"]}
```
